channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed

item.title: Woman saves £30 on luggage fees by mailing her clothes ahead of a flight
item.description: Laura Poole, a 33-year-old confidence trainer from Cardiff, avoided paying a £30 luggage fee by posting her clothes for just £2.59. She shipped several outfits, including dresses and suit jackets, usi...

item.title: U.S.-Israel Conflict: Analyzing the Impact on Iran's Leadership
item.description: The ongoing U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran have escalated over the past few days, causing significant damage and fatalities within Iran's leadership structure. Hundreds have been killed, and retaliatory ...

item.title: ChatGPT Sees Massive Spike in Uninstalls Following Department of Defense Deal
item.description: The mobile app uninstalls of ChatGPT saw a staggering 295% jump on February 28, 2026, in the U.S., following news of OpenAI's partnership with the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD). This spike marked a...

item.title: James Webb Telescope Discovers Distant Jellyfish Galaxy with Star Formation
item.description: Astronomers using the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) have identified the most distant jellyfish galaxy ever observed. This galaxy, located 8.5 billion light-years away, exhibits long, flowing trail...

item.title: Supreme Court Imposes Penalty on Employer for Delaying Compensation Payment

item.title: Tech Entrepreneur Ethan Agarwal Challenges Ro Khanna for California's 17th Congressional District

item.title: Shortage of Public Defenders Results in Hundreds of Criminal Case Dismissals in Oregon and Across the U.S.
item.description: Oregon's Supreme Court recently ruled that more than 1,400 criminal cases must be dismissed due to a severe shortage of public defenders. This issue isn't isolated to Oregon; across the U.S., many sta...

item.title: Australia Doubles Graduate Visa Fees and Introduces Other Changes
item.description: Australia has announced a significant increase in application fees for the 485 graduate visa, a visa that allows international students to stay and work in Australia for two years post-graduation. Fro...

item.title: PDEA Declares Cotabato City’s LGU Operations Center Drug-Free
item.description: On March 2, 2026, the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA) officially declared the People’s Palace in Cotabato City as a drug-free workplace. The declaration was made during a formal ceremony hel...

item.title: House Committee Approves Anti-Political Dynasty Bill, Sees It as Major Step in Political Reform

item.title: How the Iran Conflict is Affecting UK Energy Prices and Consumer Bills
item.description: The ongoing Iran conflict is having significant economic ramifications that are already pushing up global oil and gas prices. The Strait of Hormuz, a key oil trade route, has been affected by Iranian ...
